first_paragraph: ***The Narrow Valley*** is a 1921 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Cecil Hepworth](/wiki/Cecil_Hepworth "Cecil Hepworth").[[2]](#cite_note-2) As of August 2010, the film is missing from the [BFI National Archive](/wiki/BFI_National_Archive "BFI National Archive"), and is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" lost films.[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1921 film

| The Narrow Valley | |
| --- | --- |
| Directed by | [Cecil Hepworth](/wiki/Cecil_Hepworth "Cecil Hepworth") |
| Written by | [George Dewhurst](/wiki/George_Dewhurst_(director) "George Dewhurst (director)") |
| Starring | [Alma Taylor](/wiki/Alma_Taylor "Alma Taylor") George Dewhurst |
| Production company | [Hepworth Picture Plays](/wiki/Hepworth_Picture_Plays "Hepworth Picture Plays")[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1) |
| Distributed by | Hepworth |
| Release dates | * 8 June 1921 (1921-06-08) (trade show) * 29 August 1921 (1921-08-29) (theatrical release) [[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1) |
| Running time | 5400 feet |
| Country | United Kingdom |
| Language | Silent |

***The Narrow Valley*** is a 1921 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Cecil Hepworth](/wiki/Cecil_Hepworth "Cecil Hepworth").[[2]](#cite_note-2) As of August 2010, the film is missing from the [BFI National Archive](/wiki/BFI_National_Archive "BFI National Archive"), and is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" lost films.[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Narrow_Valley&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

A draper's maid lives a quiet life in her village. She falls in love with the son of a local poacher. Their romance faces opposition from the village watch committee, who disapprove of her presence and try to force her out. Despite the committee's efforts, the maid and the poacher's son successfully marry.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Narrow_Valley&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Alma Taylor](/wiki/Alma_Taylor "Alma Taylor") as Victoria
* [George Dewhurst](/wiki/George_Dewhurst_(director) "George Dewhurst (director)") as Jerry Hawkins
* [James Carew](/wiki/James_Carew "James Carew") as Eli Jones
* [Hugh Clifton](/wiki/Hugh_Clifton "Hugh Clifton") as Richard Jones
* [Gwynne Herbert](/wiki/Gwynne_Herbert "Gwynne Herbert") as Ursula Jones
* [Lottie Blackford](/wiki/Lottie_Blackford "Lottie Blackford") as Miss Pine
